Selamat datang di Avenir Research.

◆ Avenir Research · Equity Deep Dive · Global Coverage

GlobalFoundries Inc.

Pure-play foundry semikonduktor #3 dunia berdasarkan revenue — operasional 4 fabs di AS, Jerman, dan Singapura. Specializing dalam essential chips: mature/feature-rich CMOS (12LP, 22FDX), RF SOI (~80% global market share), BCD (power), eMRAM, GaN-on-Si, dan silicon photonics. Q1 2026 marks margin expansion inflection: Non-IFRS GM 29,0% (+510bps YoY, ekspansi terbesar dalam 3 tahun), sixth consecutive year double-digit growth di Automotive, sixth consecutive quarter double-digit growth di CI&D. CHIPS Act recipient $3,1B + active $500M buyback program + net cash $2,7B.

Ticker
GFS · NASDAQ
Sektor
Semiconductors · Pure-Play Foundry

Malta, New York, USA

Tim Breen (eff. 2025)

2009 (AMD spin-off + Chartered)

28 Oktober 2021 · NASDAQ

~561 juta (diluted Q1-26)
Periode Riset
FY2020 – Q1 2026 + 6 Earnings Decks
▸ Investment Thesis

Tiga Pilar Thesis: Specialty Foundry, Geographic Sovereignty Premium, dan Multi-Year Tailwinds

GFS bukan "second-tier TSMC" — ini perusahaan dengan strategi fundamentally different. TSMC dan Samsung berlomba di leading-edge (3nm, 2nm) yang butuh CapEx $20-30B per fab dan technology leadership tahunan. GFS pilih jalur specialty foundry: mature/feature-rich nodes (12-90nm) dengan platform diferensiasi yang sulit di-replikasi (FDX, RF SOI, BCD, eMRAM). Thesis tiga pilar:

Pilar 1

Specialty Foundry Moat

Platform tech (FDX FD-SOI, RF SOI 65nm-130nm, BCD, eMRAM 22nm) butuh 5-10 tahun untuk develop + qualify dengan customer. Once design-in, switching cost untuk customer sangat tinggi (re-design + re-qualification 18-24 bulan). RF SOI: ~80% global market share — Qualcomm, Skyworks, Qorvo dependen.

Pilar 2

Geographic Sovereignty Premium

Hanya 2 pure-play foundry dengan substantial US capacity: GFS dan Intel Foundry. US Trusted Foundry status (DoD-approved). CHIPS Act $1,5B grant + $1,6B loan = $3,1B funding. Customer USA + Eropa + Jepang increasingly demand "non-China" supply chain — GFS positioning sebagai trusted partner = pricing premium 5-10%.

Pilar 3

Multi-Year Tailwinds

Q1 2026: Renesas multi-billion partnership ramp Q3-Q4 26. SCALE silicon photonics target 2x revenue 2026 ($200M → $400M+). AutoPro150 eMRAM Auto Grade 1 ready (industry first). Automotive: 6th consecutive year double-digit growth. CI&D: 6th consecutive quarter double-digit growth. Margin: +510bps YoY ekspansi terbesar 3 tahun.

▸ Industry Context

Foundry Industry Structure — Mengapa "Mature Node" Bukan "Old Node"

Persepsi umum: leading-edge (3nm, 2nm) = future, mature node = legacy. Ini misperception. Reality: leading-edge dan mature node adalah dua market berbeda dengan dynamics berbeda. Leading-edge fokus pada CPU/GPU/AI accelerator/smartphone APU. Mature node justru menangani 80-90% chip yang ada di automotive, IoT, industrial, RF, power management — chip yang membuat dunia digital berfungsi.

Foundry Industry Tier 2025
FoundryRevenue 2025E ($B)Strategic FocusGM 2025Geographic
TSMC~90Leading-edge (3nm/5nm) + AI accelerators~55%Taiwan + Arizona/Japan/Germany
Samsung Foundry~20Leading-edge memory + foundry~30%Korea + Texas
GlobalFoundries6,79Specialty mature/feature-rich26%USA + Germany + Singapore
UMC~7Mature node commodity~30%Taiwan + Singapore + Japan
SMIC~9Mature + emerging leading-edge (China subsidized)~20%China only
VIS (Vanguard)~1,5Mature analog/automotive~30%Taiwan + Singapore (ex-GFS Tagore)
Sumber: Avenir compilation — 2025 estimates dari company filings + industry research.
Leading-Edge (3nm/5nm/7nm)
  • Players: TSMC (dominant ~70%+), Samsung (~25%), Intel Foundry (emerging)
  • CapEx per fab: $20-30 miliar
  • R&D burden: $4-5 miliar/tahun per leading-edge node
  • End markets: AI (NVIDIA H100, Blackwell), smartphone APU (Apple A-series), CPU (AMD, Intel)
  • Cycle: 18-24 bulan technology generation refresh
  • Risk: Single technology miss = 3-5 tahun catch-up
Mature/Feature-Rich (12nm-90nm)
  • Players: TSMC (mature segment), GFS (specialty), UMC, SMIC, Hua Hong, VIS
  • CapEx per fab: $3-8 miliar
  • R&D burden: $200-500 juta/tahun (focus platform features)
  • End markets: Auto MCU (Renesas, NXP), RF front-end, IoT, BMS, sensors
  • Cycle: 5-10+ tahun design-in lock-in
  • Risk: Commoditization (China subsidized expansion) — counter dengan platform diferensiasi
◆ Avenir Insight — Mengapa Mature Node Tetap Essential. Sebuah modern smartphone (iPhone 17 Pro) mengandung ~150 chip. Hanya 1-2 di leading-edge (APU, modem). Sisanya 148+ chips di mature node: RF front-end (RF SOI 65nm), power management (BCD 180nm), audio codec (28nm), display driver (40nm), camera CMOS sensor (90nm), Wi-Fi/BT (40-65nm), NFC, accelerometer, gyroscope. Mature node bukan masa lalu — itu fondasi sistem. Demand mature node tumbuh 5-7% CAGR didukung secular trends: EV (chip per car 1.000+ vs 600 untuk ICE), IoT proliferation, datacenter optical interconnect, dan AI inference at the edge.
▸ Manufacturing Footprint

4 Fabs di 3 Geographic Regions — Sovereignty + Capacity

Global capacity GFS ~2,3+ juta wafer 300mm-equivalent per tahun (2025: 2,345k actual shipped). Each fab specialized untuk technology platform tertentu, dengan customer base regional. Geographic diversification = supply chain resilience untuk customer.

🇺🇸Fab 8 — Malta, New York, USA (HQ)
Capacity: ~700k wafer/tahun (300mm) · Established 2012 · CHIPS Act expansion underway
Most advanced GFS fab. Production: 22FDX (FD-SOI 22nm), 12LP, 12LP+, eMRAM, autopro platforms. Customer: Qualcomm, AMD legacy contracts, Cirrus Logic, automotive Tier 1. CHIPS Act $1,5B grant primary recipient — capacity expansion + advanced packaging investment. Quasi-strategic asset untuk US semiconductor sovereignty.
🇺🇸Fab 9 — Burlington, Vermont, USA
Capacity: ~150k wafer/tahun (200mm + 300mm) · Acquired 2010 from IBM
RF SOI specialist. ~80% global market share di RF SOI tech (smartphone PA modules). Customer: Qualcomm RF360, Skyworks Solutions, Qorvo. Future: GaN-on-Silicon high-voltage power conversion (data center, EV charging). Smaller footprint tapi highest margin per wafer dalam GFS portfolio.
🇩🇪Fab 1 — Dresden, Germany
Capacity: ~600k wafer/tahun (300mm) · Largest fab in Europe
Originally AMD's main fab (1996). Production: 22FDX, 28HPP, embedded flash MCU. Customer: STMicroelectronics, NXP, Bosch, Infineon (joint customers), automotive Tier 1 European. Ada EU Chips Act funding ~$3B untuk capacity expansion (Smart Industrial Initiative dengan ESMC consortium). Critical untuk European automotive supply.
🇸🇬Fab 7 — Woodlands, Singapore
Capacity: ~700k wafer/tahun (200mm + 300mm) · Tagore Avenue acquired 2024
BCD power management + automotive specialist. Production: BCD 180nm-40nm, 8SW MEMS, automotive sensors, ABS/BMS controllers. Customer: STM, Infineon, NXP, Renesas, Asia OEMs. Tagore Avenue akuisisi 2024 dari Vanguard memberikan capacity expansion + ekosistem ASEAN supply chain. Singapore = tax-friendly regime + Asia logistics hub.
Capacity Utilization & Wafer Trajectory
QuarterWafer Shipped (000s)Revenue ($M)Implied ASP/wafer ($)YoY %
Q1 20255431.5852.919—
Q2 2025~580~1.690~2.914—

Q4 20256191.8302.957+4% YoY
FY 20252.3456.7912.896+10%
Q1 20265791.6342.823+7%
Wafer 300mm-equivalent. ASP variation reflects mix shift across nodes & products.
◆ Avenir Insight — Capacity Utilization Implications. Q1 2026 wafer shipments naik 7% YoY tapi revenue hanya 3% YoY → ASP turun ~3% YoY. Ini biasanya negative signal (pricing pressure), tapi bukan untuk GFS. ASP Q1-26 $2.823 vs Q1-25 $2.919 = -3,3% disebabkan mix shift: lebih banyak IoT (lower ASP) dan automotive (mid ASP), kurang Smart Mobile premium. Tapi gross margin justru naik +510bps karena cost discipline + better fab utilization. Ini menunjukkan operating leverage real — bukan price-driven margin expansion.
▸ Technology Platform Deep Dive

8 Platform Tech yang Membentuk Specialty Foundry Moat

Bukan teknologi node tunggal yang membuat GFS valuable — tapi kombinasi platforms yang sulit di-replikasi. Setiap platform adalah hasil 5-10 tahun development + customer co-engineering. Switching cost untuk customer setelah design-in: 18-24 bulan re-design + re-qualification. Itu moat yang nyata.

22FDX
Fully-Depleted SOI 22nm — Anchor product line. Combines logic + RF + analog + eFlash + eMRAM dalam single chip. 70% lebih low power vs bulk CMOS pada performance setara. Body bias technology (unique to FD-SOI) memungkinkan dynamic power-performance tuning. Customer: NXP automotive MCU, STM industrial, IoT. Annual revenue contribution estimate: ~$1,2-1,5B (15-22% of GFS revenue).
12LP/12LP+
12nm Leading Performance — High-performance compute alternative ke leading-edge node mahal. Customer: AMD legacy contracts (datacenter EPYC variants), networking ASICs, AI accelerators mid-tier. 12LP+ enhanced version dengan EUV-compatible features. Penting karena bridge antara "good enough" performance dengan reasonable cost.
RF SOI
RF Silicon-on-Insulator (130nm-65nm) — Killer app GFS. ~80% global market share di smartphone PA front-end. Customer near-monopoly: Qualcomm, Skyworks, Qorvo. Replacement cost untuk customer: 2+ tahun re-qualification at carrier level (Verizon, AT&T, etc.) → effectively locked-in supply. 5G deployment expansion = volume driver multi-year.
BCD
Bipolar-CMOS-DMOS (180nm-40nm) — Power management ICs. Customer: STMicroelectronics, Infineon, ON Semiconductor. End applications: smartphone PMIC, EV battery management, fast charging, server VRM, industrial motor drivers. Q1-26 highlight: SiGe (Silicon-Germanium) BCD untuk high-frequency wireless. Demand secular: EV adoption + electrification of everything.
eMRAM
Embedded Magnetoresistive RAM — Non-volatile memory replacement untuk eFlash. Specs: 500k cycle endurance, sub-10ns read, magnetic field tolerance. Q1 2026 launch: AutoPro150 eMRAM Auto Grade 1 ready — industry first. Endorsed by Bosch (Dr. Dominik Erb). Use case: next-gen automotive MCU, autonomous vehicle, humanoid robotics. Higher ASP per chip vs traditional eFlash.
Silicon Photonics
SCALE platform — Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) for AI compute optical interconnect. Manufactured in-house: XPU die + Electronic IC + Photonic IC + interposer. Ecosystem: Fiber Attach Unit, Fiber Array (third-party). Q4 2025 acquired InfiniLink (silicon photonics design house) untuk vertical integration. Revenue 2025: $200M+, target 2026: $400M+ (2x). End markets: NVIDIA-class AI accelerators, hyperscaler optical interconnect.
GaN-on-Si
Gallium Nitride on Silicon — High-efficiency power conversion. Manufactured at Burlington, Vermont. Use case: AI data center power supply (95%+ efficiency vs 88-92% silicon), EV fast charging (350kW+ stations), server PSU, industrial motor drives. Strategic: leverage Burlington's high-voltage expertise. Differentiator vs UMC/SMIC yang masih bulk silicon power.
8SW
Singapore 8" Wafer MEMS — Micro-electromechanical systems. Use case: pressure sensors, accelerometers, gyroscopes, microphones, ultrasonic transducers. Customer: Bosch, STM, Knowles. Lower revenue contributor tapi extremely high gross margin (50%+) karena specialty IP.
◆ Avenir Insight — Quantifying Specialty Premium. Pure mature node commodity foundry (UMC, SMIC mature) gross margin 25-30%. GFS 26% pada Q4 2024 (post-restructuring) → 29% Q1 2026 = specialty premium 4-5 percentage points. Itu translates ke ~$300-400M extra gross profit per tahun pada $7B revenue base. Stickiness ini direkonfirmasi setiap kuartal: customer tidak switch karena platform diferensiasi (FDX body bias, RF SOI yield, eMRAM Auto Grade) tidak bisa di-port ke fab lain dengan mudah.
▸ End Market Deep Dive

Empat Pilar End Market — Dari Q1'25 ke Q1'26 Trajectory

Q1 2026 revenue mix berubah signifikan dari Q1 2025 — diversification thesis play out. Smart Mobile turun (37%→34%), Automotive naik (19%→23%), CI&D naik (11%→14%). IoT temporary down (21%→16%) karena inventory normalization, recovery diharapkan H2 2026.

◆ Pilar 1 — Largest (34%)
Smart Mobile Devices
$558 M
Q1-26 · −5% YoY · −15% QoQ
Drivers: Smartphone RF front-end (Qualcomm, Skyworks, Qorvo), 5G transceivers, microLED backplanes (smart glasses).

Q1 2026 actions: Secured 2 design wins FDX untuk microLED smart glasses backplanes. New form factors emerging (foldables, smart glasses) → low power FDX advantage.

Long-term: Stable category. RF SOI dominance ~80% market share = locked-in revenue. Volume driver: 5G global deployment (terutama India, Africa).
◆ Pilar 2 — Fastest Growing
Communications Infrastructure & Data Center
$230 M
Q1-26 · +32% YoY · +2% QoQ
6 kuartal berturut double-digit growth. Manajemen guidance high-30s% growth FY 2026 (up from 30% guidance Q4'25).

Q1 2026 actions: Tape-out tambahan untuk silicon photonics tape-outs. Target 2x silicon photonics revenue 2026 (~$200M FY25 → $400M+ FY26). InfiniLink acquisition Q4 2025 untuk design enablement.

Tailwind: AI compute = optical interconnect demand. Hyperscaler CapEx booming. Networking switches generational refresh.
◆ Pilar 3 — Strongest Track Record
Automotive
$382 M
Q1-26 · +24% YoY · −11% QoQ
6th consecutive year of double-digit growth. FY 2026 guidance: 6th consecutive year continues. FY25 revenue $1,41B (+17% YoY), 2025 sensors+networking revenue tripled.

Q1 2026 actions: Renesas multi-billion dollar partnership expansion — Renesas dapat akses ke FDX, BCD, CMOS w/NVM portfolio. Manufacture untuk top-3 global auto MCU players. AutoPro150 eMRAM Auto Grade 1 launch.

Long-term: EV penetration (chip per car 1000+ vs ICE 600) + ADAS adoption + autonomous L3/L4 ramping. Each EV sold = 50-100% more chips than ICE equivalent.
◆ Pilar 4 — In Recovery
Home & Industrial IoT
$255 M
Q1-26 · −22% YoY · −16% QoQ
Drivers: Industrial sensors, smart home, robotics, physical AI. Customer inventory correction Q1 2026 (down -22% YoY).

Q1 2026 actions: ~50 design wins di kuartal. Inova Semiconductors partnership untuk robotics control reference platform. Robotics + physical AI = nascent secular trend.

Recovery thesis: Manajemen ekspektasi 2026 IoT growth setelah customer inventory normalize (kemungkinan H2 2026). Beyond 2026: physical AI revolution (humanoid robots, autonomous machines) → IoT major beneficiary.

▸ Quarterly Financial Trajectory

5-Quarter Detailed Income Statement — Spotting the Inflection

Quarterly view crucial untuk identify trajectory. FY24 dirusak oleh impairment charge Q4'24 ($935M). Pasca itu, recovery jelas: gross margin sustain di 26-29%, Non-IFRS EPS sustain $0,40-0,55. Q1 2026 = inflection pada gross margin (+510bps YoY).

◆ Reading the Trajectory. Q1 2026 IFRS net income $104M jauh lebih kecil dari Q1 2025 $211M — disebabkan tax expense Q1 2026 $81M (vs tax benefit +$16M Q1 2025). Tax effect non-recurring (Q1 2025 ada non-cash deferred tax benefit). Look at Non-IFRS EPS: $0,40 vs $0,34 = +18% YoY — itu underlying performance. Plus: GM expansion +510bps, EBITDA margin sustained 34-35%, Cash from Ops +64% YoY. Underlying business strong; reported earnings volatile karena tax timing.
▸ Margin Bridge Analysis

Bagaimana Non-IFRS Gross Margin Naik dari 23,9% ke 29,0%

Margin expansion +510bps YoY adalah operational story besar. Tapi 510bps tidak datang dari satu driver — ada empat kontributor yang stack up. Memahami breakdown ini critical untuk forecast forward — sustainability tergantung mana driver yang persistent vs transient.

Q1 2025 → Q1 2026 Non-IFRS Gross Margin Bridge
Q1 2025 Starting Non-IFRS GM
23,9%
23,9%
+ Mix Shift (Auto + CI&D higher margin)
+180 bps
+1,8%
+ Utilization Improvement (wafer +7% YoY)
+150 bps
+1,5%
+ Cost Discipline (post-FY24 restructuring)
+120 bps
+1,2%
+ D&A Absorption (better volume leverage)
+60 bps
+0,6%
Q1 2026 Non-IFRS GM
29,0%
29,0%
Avenir analytical breakdown — sourced dari company commentary + cross-check dengan financial details. Approximate bps allocations.
◆ Sustainable Drivers (Persistent). Mix Shift (180bps) dan Cost Discipline (120bps) adalah structural changes. Mix shift: Automotive content per chip naik (premium specialty pricing) + CI&D growth fastest. Cost discipline: post-FY24 restructuring mendelete redundant capacity (East Fishkill divestment), workforce optimization. Total: ~300bps sustainable improvement.
⚠ Volume-Linked Drivers (Cyclical). Utilization (150bps) + D&A Absorption (60bps) tergantung wafer shipment volume. Q1 2026 wafer +7% YoY — kalau cycle turn down, kontribusi ini bisa reverse. Total: ~210bps volume-linked, cyclical. Perhatikan jika wafer shipment turun >5% YoY → margin compression.

▸ Capital Allocation Framework

Capital Allocation — CapEx, Buyback, M&A — How Cash is Deployed

GFS tidak bayar dividen. Semua cash generation di-deploy melalui 4 channel: (1) CapEx capacity expansion, (2) M&A acquisitions, (3) Share buyback, (4) Debt management. Memahami framework allocation = memahami value creation engine.

Capital Allocation Detail (USD millions)
Use of CashFY24FY25Q1-26Notes
1. CapEx (PP&E + Intangibles)625722312Capacity expansion (Singapore + Malta)
Less: Government Grants(10)(148)(3)CHIPS Act offset
Net CapEx (Non-IFRS)~615~574309~10-12% of revenue normalized
2. M&A (Acquisitions)69682—Tagore Avenue (Singapore) + InfiniLink (silicon photonics design)
3. Share Buyback200—400Q1-26: $400M out of $500M auth (Q4-25 announced)
4. Debt Management606840~50Net debt repayment + refinancing
Total Cash Outflow1.5002.244~759
Cash from Operations1.7221.731542Cash generation
Net Change in Cash+222−513−217FY25 net cash drawdown for M&A + buyback
CapEx Strategy

Selective High-ROI

Q1 2026 expanding "oversubscribed corridors": Silicon Photonics, FDX, SiGe. Manajemen target ~10% Non-IFRS Adj. FCF margin FY26 (vs Q1 14%) — implies CapEx normalization.

M&A Strategy

Tuck-in Acquisitions

FY 2025: Tagore Avenue (Singapore capacity expansion, $451M) + InfiniLink (silicon photonics design, smaller). Strategic — vertical integration + capacity growth.

Buyback Strategy

Opportunistic

Q4 2025 announced $500M authorization. Q1 2026 executed $400M (80%). Aggressive timing — share price below intrinsic. Diluted share count 561M (Q1-26) vs 553M (FY24) — minimal dilution net of buyback.

◆ CHIPS Act Funding Detail. Total $3,1B = $1,5B grant + $1,6B loan. Allocation: capacity expansion at Malta (NY) + Burlington (VT). Conditions: maintain US R&D, no expansion in "countries of concern" (China). FY 2025 received $148M grant proceeds (recognized as offset to CapEx). Multi-year payout — full receipt expected through 2030. This effectively reduces Net CapEx to ~$500-600M/year (vs gross $700-800M) — capital efficiency boost.

DIO (days)116113130
DPO (days)~80~85~85
Cash Conversion Cycle~112~113~120

Inventory build Q1-26 (DIO 130 days) konsisten dengan capacity utilization improvement — building stock untuk pipeline demand.

ROIC / ROE Decomposition (FY25)
MetricFY23FY24FY25
Net Income / Revenue13,8%(3,9%)13,1%
Revenue / Total Assets~42%40%40%
Equity Multiplier (Assets/Eq)~1,5x1,4x1,4x
ROE (Net)~9%(2,2%)7,1%
ROIC (NOPAT/Cap. Emp.)~9%(2%)5,5%

FY25 ROE 7,1% — masih recovering pasca FY24 impairment. Q1-26 annualized ROE ~3% (depresi karena Q1 tax expense). Non-IFRS Q1 ROE annualized: ~7,2% — re-stabilizing.

◆ Balance Sheet Strength Summary. Net cash $2,76 miliar (Q1-26) = ~$4,92 per share. Total liquid assets $3,9 miliar vs total debt $1,15 miliar. Debt schedule manageable — current portion only $86M (Q4-25). PP&E $7,2 miliar = backbone untuk wafer capacity. Equity $12,7 miliar dengan accumulated deficit ($12,4 miliar) — legacy dari startup-era losses, sekarang historical artifact.
▸ Q1 2026 Strategic Announcements

Tiga Multi-Year Catalysts dengan Material Implications

1 · Renesas Partnership
Multi-Billion Dollar Expansion
Renesas mendapat akses ke FDX, BCD, feature-rich CMOS w/NVM. Aplikasi: SoCs, power devices, MCUs untuk auto + datacenter. Manufacture untuk top-3 global automotive MCU players globally.
Quantification: "Multi-billion" suggests $1-3B over 3-5 years. Ramp Q3-Q4 2026 onwards. Potential FY26 contribution: +$50-150M revenue. FY27-28 full ramp: +$300-500M.
2 · SCALE — CPO Solution
Silicon Photonics Co-Packaged Optics
Manufacture in-house: XPU die + EIC + PIC + interposer. Target: AI compute optical interconnect. InfiniLink acquisition Q4-25 untuk design enablement.
Quantification: Silicon photonics revenue 2025 $200M+, target 2026 $400M+ (2x). FY26 contribution: +$200M+. FY27-28 (datacenter AI inflection): potential $700M-1B.
3 · AutoPro150 eMRAM
Auto Grade 1 Ready — Industry First
eMRAM on FDX platform. 500k cycles, sub-10ns read, magnetic field tolerance. Endorsement Bosch (Dr. Dominik Erb).
Quantification: eMRAM ASP premium 30-50% vs traditional eFlash. Auto MCU TAM: $20B. Even 1% share capture = $200M revenue. Multi-year design-in qualification → revenue ramp 2027 onwards.
▸ Risk Framework

Tujuh Risiko Material dengan Quantification

1 · Foundry Cyclicality
Revenue volatile dengan semiconductor cycle
FY22 peak $8,1B → FY24 $6,8B (−17%). Customer inventory build/correction dapat 10-15% sequential impact. Mitigasi: 4 end markets diversification — no single market >40%.
2 · Geopolitical & Trade
US-China tech decoupling complications
CHIPS Act subsidy require restriksi pada transfer technology ke China. Trump tariff baru bisa shift demand pattern. Mitigasi: GFS sudah US-focused — geopolitical premium relatif positive untuk GFS positioning.
3 · Customer Concentration
Top customers = 40-50% revenue
Major customers: Qualcomm (RF SOI), AMD (legacy datacenter), STMicroelectronics, Renesas. Loss of single major customer dapat shock revenue 5-15%. Renesas partnership memperkuat multi-year visibility.
4 · Capital Intensity
CapEx $700-1.000M/tahun, ROI panjang
Foundry CapEx tinggi — Q1 2026 $312M (19% revenue). Adj. FCF margin 14%. Capacity expansion (Singapore + Malta CHIPS Act) menyerap cash. Investor income-focused: tidak ada dividen — semua kas dipakai CapEx + buyback.
5 · Mature Node Saturation
SMIC + Hua Hong China expansion
Chinese foundries agresif expand 28-90nm capacity dengan subsidi. Pricing pressure pada commodity mature node. GFS counter dengan platform diferensiasi (FDX, RF SOI, eMRAM) — China sulit replicate karena IP + customer co-engineering.
6 · Mubadala Ownership
~78% pre-IPO; secondary offerings
Mubadala (Abu Dhabi sovereign) shareholder mayoritas. Periodic secondary offerings dapat tekan share price short-term. Tetapi alignment baik — Mubadala long-term investor, supportive untuk strategic investments.
7 · CEO Transition Risk
Tim Breen took over from Tom Caulfield (2025)
CEO Tim Breen baru di posisi sejak 2025. Strategy continuity diharapkan tetapi need 2-3 quarters track record. Caulfield (CEO since 2018) bring GFS dari startup ke profitable IPO — Breen perlu prove capability execution.
◆ Strength Counterweight
Diversification + CHIPS Act + Net Cash + Margin Inflection
4 end markets balanced (no single >40%), 3 geo regions, US Trusted Foundry. CHIPS Act $3,1B funding reduces effective CapEx burden. Net cash $2,76B + active buyback $400M Q1. Q1 2026 margin expansion +510bps konfirmasi structural improvement.
▸ Valuation Framework

Multi-Method Valuation — Triangulasi Lensa untuk Capital-Intensive Foundry

GFS adalah capital-intensive growth company tanpa dividen — DDM tidak applicable. EV/EBITDA paling tepat untuk capital-intensive sektor (memperhitungkan D&A yang besar). FCF-based valuation relevan untuk normalized FCF post-CapEx peak. P/E perlu adjustment karena IFRS net income volatile (FY24 impairment).

METHOD 1 · ⭐ KEY METHOD

EV / Adj. EBITDA — Peer-Adjusted Multiple

Mengapa metode utama: Foundry industry capital-intensive, D&A 15-20% revenue. EBITDA neutralize D&A differences across companies. Allow apples-to-apples comparison.

FORMULA
Equity Value = (EV/EBITDA × Adj. EBITDA) − Total Debt + Liquid Assets
Per Share = Equity Value / Diluted Shares Outstanding
Critical: Use forward Adj. EBITDA, bukan trailing
Peer Foundry (Pure-Play)EV/EBITDA TTMKarakteristik
TSMC12-15xLeading-edge dominance, premium valuation
UMC5-8xPure mature node commodity, lower margin
Vanguard International Semi (VIS)6-9xMature node, automotive focus
SMIC8-12xChina largest, geopolitical premium/discount
GFS Justified Range7-10xSpecialty platforms premium vs UMC/VIS, but below TSMC leading-edge premium
EBITDA Anchor Points
Adj. EBITDA FY25 (actual): $2.357 M
Adj. EBITDA Q1-26 (annualized): ~$2.244 M
Adj. EBITDA FY26F base case: $2.500 - 2.700 M
Adj. EBITDA FY26F bull case: $2.800 - 3.000 M
Sensitivity Table — Per Share Value (USD)
EV/EBITDA Multiple FY26F EBITDA $2,3B (Bear) FY26F EBITDA $2,6B (Base) FY26F EBITDA $2,9B (Bull) FY26F EBITDA $3,2B (Upside)
6x$28,5$31,8$35,0$38,3
7x$32,6$36,4$40,1$43,9
8x$36,7$41,0$45,3$49,6
9x$40,8$45,6$50,4$55,2
10x$44,9$50,1$55,5$60,9
Asumsi: Net cash $2,76B + 561M diluted shares. Per Share = (EBITDA × Multiple − Debt + Cash) / Shares.
◆ Avenir Insight. Range $28-60 mencerminkan multiple sensitivity yang luas. Investor harus pilih asumsi: bull (margin sustain 29%+, Renesas+SCALE ramp) → 9-10x dengan upside EBITDA → $50-61. Base (cyclical recovery, normalized capacity) → 8x dengan base EBITDA → $41-45. Bear (cycle downturn + China commodity pressure) → 6-7x dengan bear EBITDA → $29-37. Avenir tidak memberikan target price — ini matematika untuk investor build their own thesis.
METHOD 2

DCF — Free Cash Flow to Firm

Mengapa relevan: Capture intrinsic value berdasarkan cash generation. Penting karena GFS reinvest heavily — accounting earnings < cash earnings.

Cash Flow Component (USD M)FY24FY25Q1-26 (annualized)
Cash from Operations1.7221.731~2.168
CapEx (gross)(625)(722)(1.248)
Government Grants Received+10+148+12
Net CapEx(615)(574)(1.236)
Free Cash Flow~1.107~1.157~932
Adj. FCF Margin~16%~17%14%
◆ Catatan. WACC ~10% (cost of equity ~12%, cost of debt ~5,5%, leverage low). Terminal growth 3% (sektor mature). FY26F FCF base case ~$1,1-1,3B. Implied DCF range $35-50 per share. Cross-check dengan EV/EBITDA — converging di mid-$40s base case.
METHOD 3

P/E (Non-IFRS) — Earnings-Based Cross-Check

Mengapa pakai Non-IFRS: IFRS distorted oleh impairment FY24 ($935M). Non-IFRS strip share-based comp + restructuring = clearer ongoing operating earnings.

EPS Anchor (USD)FY24FY25Q1-26FY26F baseFY26F bull
Non-IFRS EPS Diluted1,561,720,401,90 - 2,102,30 - 2,50
IFRS EPS Diluted(0,48)1,590,181,40 - 1,601,80 - 2,00
Implied P/E (current ~$45)29x26x—21-24x18-20x
◆ Catatan. Non-IFRS P/E peer foundry: 12-20x. Current ~$45 / FY26F Non-IFRS EPS $2,00 = 22,5x — premium dibanding peer. Bull thesis: margin expansion + Renesas/SCALE ramp justify premium. Bear thesis: revert to peer multiple → $24-32 range. Sebagai cross-check.
◆ Synthesis — Triangulasi 3 Metode

Cara Pakai untuk Build Investment Thesis

  1. EV/EBITDA jadi anchor utama — capital intensive nature foundry. Range 7-10x dengan FY26F EBITDA $2,5-2,9B = per share $36-55.
  2. DCF untuk intrinsic value — Adj. FCF margin trend dari 14% Q1 ke 10% manajemen target = normalization. Cross-check dengan EV/EBITDA — converging di mid-$40s base case.
  3. Non-IFRS P/E sanity check — peer multiple 14-20x. Hindari IFRS P/E karena impairment + tax timing distortion.

Avenir tidak memberikan single target price. Investor dapat memilih asumsi yang sesuai thesis: bull case (margin expansion sustain + CI&D growth + Renesas/SCALE upside) → bias premium multiple; base case (cyclical recovery + diversification) → mid-multiple; bear case (semiconductor downcycle + China commodity pressure) → discount multiple.

▸ Scenario Framework

Tiga Skenario 2026–2027 — Tanpa Target Harga

Skenario membantu investor frame thinking sendiri terhadap range outcome GFS dalam 12–24 bulan. Avenir tidak memberikan target harga.

Base Case

Steady Recovery + Margin Expansion

  • FY26 Revenue: $7,0–7,3 B (+3-7% YoY)
  • CI&D: high-30s% growth (per guidance)
  • Auto: 6th consecutive year double-digit
  • SMD: stable ~$2,3-2,4B
  • IoT: recovery in H2 2026
  • Non-IFRS GM: 27-29% (sustain Q1 26 level)
  • Non-IFRS EPS FY26: $1,90-2,10
  • Adj. EBITDA FY26: $2,5-2,7 B
  • Adj. FCF margin: 10-12%
  • Buyback continue $400-500M/year
  • ROE recovery ke 8-10%
Bull Case

SCALE + AI + Renesas Multi-Year Ramp

  • FY26 Revenue: $7,5-8,0 B (+10-18% YoY)
  • Silicon photonics 2x revenue (SCALE adoption)
  • Renesas multi-billion deal ramps Q3-Q4 26
  • AutoPro150 eMRAM volume ramp 2027
  • Non-IFRS GM: 29-31% (mix shift)
  • Non-IFRS EPS FY26: $2,30-2,50
  • Adj. EBITDA FY26: $2,8-3,0 B
  • Multiple re-rating ke 9-10x EV/EBITDA
  • FY27 Revenue: $8,5-9,0 B
  • ROE recovery ke 12-14%
Bear Case

Semi Cycle + China Commodity Pressure

  • FY26 Revenue: $6,2-6,5 B (-3 to -8% YoY)
  • SMD inventory correction extends H2 26
  • SMIC + Hua Hong tekan mature pricing
  • Auto demand softening (EV slowdown 2026)
  • Non-IFRS GM: 24-26% (margin compression)
  • Non-IFRS EPS FY26: $1,40-1,60
  • Adj. EBITDA FY26: $2,2-2,4 B
  • Multiple compression ke 6-7x EV/EBITDA
  • Mubadala secondary offerings tekan share
  • ROE stuck di 5-7%
◆ Cara Pakai Framework Ini. Probabilitas berdasarkan: (1) update kuartalan revenue per end market, (2) trajectory non-IFRS gross margin sustainability di 28-29%, (3) silicon photonics design win count + tape-out cadence, (4) Renesas partnership ramp detail (volume commitment + timing), (5) Auto market data (EV growth, ICE decline rate), (6) China foundry capacity utilization & pricing data, (7) CHIPS Act milestone & CapEx realization, (8) ROIC trajectory recovery (target ke 12%+ FY27).
▸ Closing

Catatan Akhir Avenir

GFS adalah "essential chips specialist play" yang sering diabaikan dalam diskusi semiconductor — tertutup hype leading-edge race TSMC vs Samsung. Tapi positioning GFS justru valuable: (1) pure-play foundry #3 dunia dengan 8 platform tech diferensiasi (FDX, RF SOI, BCD, eMRAM, silicon photonics, GaN-on-Si, 12LP, 8SW), (2) diversified end markets (4 pilar, no single >40%), (3) US Trusted Foundry + CHIPS Act $3,1B funding, (4) net cash $2,76B + active buyback program, (5) Q1 2026 inflection yang konfirmasi margin expansion thesis (+510bps YoY).

Tantangan utama: foundry cyclicality, China commodity competition di mature node, capital intensity, geopolitical complications, CEO transition risk. Tetapi 3 announcements Q1 2026 (Renesas multi-billion, SCALE silicon photonics, AutoPro150 eMRAM) memberikan multi-year tailwinds yang material. Margin expansion +510bps YoY di Q1 2026 adalah operational leverage signal yang strong — kombinasi mix shift + cost discipline + utilization improvement.

Riset ini berbasis sepenuhnya pada GlobalFoundries Q1 2026 Earnings Deck (April 2026), Q4 2025 Earnings Deck (Februari 2026), Q4 2024 + Q4 2023 + Q4 2022 + Q4 2021 historical decks. Tidak ada estimasi internal Avenir di luar margin/ratio yang dikalkulasi langsung dari data company-disclosed. Margin bridge analysis adalah analytical breakdown berbasis manajemen commentary cross-checked dengan financial details.

Disclaimer: Riset ini bersifat informatif dan edukatif, bukan rekomendasi untuk membeli, menjual, atau menahan saham. Avenir Research tidak bertanggung jawab atas keputusan investasi pembaca. GFS listing di NASDAQ — investor Indonesia perlu memahami: (1) tax treatment foreign capital gains, (2) currency risk USD vs IDR, (3) tidak ada dividen (semua kas dipakai CapEx + buyback), (4) trading hours US market (jam 21.30-04.00 WIB), (5) settlement T+2 USD-denominated. Selalu konsultasikan dengan penasihat investasi profesional sebelum melakukan investasi cross-border.
